name: add-api
description: Add new C# APIs to SkiaSharp by wrapping Skia C++ functionality. Structured 6-phase workflow: C++ analysis → C API creation → submodule commits → binding generation → C# wrapper → testing. Triggers: - Issue classified as "New API" (after fetching and classification) - Direct request: "add DrawFoo method", "expose SkSurface::draw", "wrap sk_foo_bar" - Keywords: "add API", "expose function", "wrap method", "create binding for"
